body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/invoice/deleteInvoice 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/invoice/deleteInvoice 
 ## 接口描述 
将已签收的发票设置为未签收，并改变关联单据的签收状态。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"body","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billType","required":true,"maxLength":"1","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","desc":"%20%E5%8F%96%E5%80%BC%E5%8F%82%E8%80%83%5B%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE%5D(https%3A%2F%2Fxft.cmbchina.com%2Fopen%2F%23%2Fdoc%2Fopen-document%3Fid%3D10692%26mid%3D11585)","exampleValue":"G"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"invoiceNo","required":false,"maxLength":"50","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7%E7%A0%81","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA1%EF%BC%8C2%EF%BC%8C3%EF%BC%8C4%EF%BC%8C8%EF%BC%8C9%EF%BC%8CA%2CB%2CC%2CD%2CG%2CH%E6%97%B6%E6%9C%89%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"12002361"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"invoiceCode","required":false,"maxLength":"50","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA1%EF%BC%8C2%EF%BC%8C3%EF%BC%8C4%EF%BC%8C8%EF%BC%8C9%EF%BC%8CA%2CB%2CC%2CD%2CG%2CH%E6%97%B6%E6%9C%89%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"21010122"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"trafficNo","maxLength":"50","label":"%E4%BA%A4%E9%80%9A%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7%E7%A0%81%2F%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA7%2CE%2CF%E6%97%B6%E4%B8%BA%E7%A5%A8%E6%8D%AE%E5%8F%B7%E7%A0%81%20%EF%BC%8C%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA5%EF%BC%8C6%E6%97%B6%E4%B8%BA%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"04829364"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"trafficCode","maxLength":"50","label":"%E4%BA%A4%E9%80%9A%E7%A5%A8%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA7%2CE%2CF%E6%97%B6%E6%9C%89%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"044031900111"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","maxLength":"8","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%B0%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 {BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/invoice/deleteInvoice?OPAUID=XFT00001
### **请求示例**
```json
[
    {
        "billType": "G",
        "invoiceCode": "21010122",
        "invoiceNo": "12002361",
        "trafficCode": null,
        "trafficNo": null
    },
    {
        "billType": "E",
        "invoiceCode": null,
        "invoiceNo": null,
        "trafficCode": 044031900111,
        "trafficNo": 04829364
    }
]
```

### **返回示例**
正常：
```json
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```
异常：
如果没有传发票信息，返回样例：
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "发票信息为空或不完整"
}
```
如果传入了其他公司的发票信息，返回样例：
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "存在其他公司的发票"
}
```
如果发票完全不属于当前公司，返回样例：
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "发票不在当前公司下"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|------------|------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| 200| 成功 | 无                            | |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/invoice/deleteInvoice

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/invoice/deleteInvoice

接口描述

将已签收的发票设置为未签收，并改变关联单据的签收状态。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"body","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billType","required":true,"maxLength":"1","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","desc":"%20%E5%8F%96%E5%80%BC%E5%8F%82%E8%80%83%5B%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE%5D(https%3A%2F%2Fxft.cmbchina.com%2Fopen%2F%23%2Fdoc%2Fopen-document%3Fid%3D10692%26mid%3D11585)","exampleValue":"G"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"invoiceNo","required":false,"maxLength":"50","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7%E7%A0%81","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA1%EF%BC%8C2%EF%BC%8C3%EF%BC%8C4%EF%BC%8C8%EF%BC%8C9%EF%BC%8CA%2CB%2CC%2CD%2CG%2CH%E6%97%B6%E6%9C%89%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"12002361"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"invoiceCode","required":false,"maxLength":"50","label":"%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA1%EF%BC%8C2%EF%BC%8C3%EF%BC%8C4%EF%BC%8C8%EF%BC%8C9%EF%BC%8CA%2CB%2CC%2CD%2CG%2CH%E6%97%B6%E6%9C%89%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"21010122"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"trafficNo","maxLength":"50","label":"%E4%BA%A4%E9%80%9A%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7%E7%A0%81%2F%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA7%2CE%2CF%E6%97%B6%E4%B8%BA%E7%A5%A8%E6%8D%AE%E5%8F%B7%E7%A0%81%20%EF%BC%8C%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA5%EF%BC%8C6%E6%97%B6%E4%B8%BA%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"04829364"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"trafficCode","maxLength":"50","label":"%E4%BA%A4%E9%80%9A%E7%A5%A8%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","desc":"%20%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA7%2CE%2CF%E6%97%B6%E6%9C%89%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"044031900111"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","maxLength":"8","required":true,"label":"%E6%96%B0%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

{BaseURL}/api/itrip-gateway/v1/invoice/deleteInvoice?OPAUID=XFT00001

请求示例

[
    {
        "billType": "G",
        "invoiceCode": "21010122",
        "invoiceNo": "12002361",
        "trafficCode": null,
        "trafficNo": null
    },
    {
        "billType": "E",
        "invoiceCode": null,
        "invoiceNo": null,
        "trafficCode": 044031900111,
        "trafficNo": 04829364
    }
]

返回示例

正常：

{
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}

异常： 如果没有传发票信息，返回样例：

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "发票信息为空或不完整"
}

如果传入了其他公司的发票信息，返回样例：

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "存在其他公司的发票"
}

如果发票完全不属于当前公司，返回样例：

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "发票不在当前公司下"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
200 成功 无
